title: parathelypteris glandulosa
intro: Parathelypteris glandulosa, also known as glandular lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is primarily found in Japan and parts of Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional medicine, Parathelypteris glandulosa is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can be used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
